zh.lifeSummary: Dornagilla MacLachlan於1272年出生在蘇格蘭。她和Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1320年在她的家鄉享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: MacLachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLaughlin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Siobhan, Aileen, Caitlin, Keane, Liam, Padric, Aine, Ciaran, Conan, Conley.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lochlainn ‘son of the Norseman’, from the personal name Lochlann ‘stranger, Norseman’, from a term denoting Scandinavia (possibly ‘land of lakes/fjords’). This was a ruling family in Ulster. See also Laughlin and compare the Scottish form McLachlan .

en.lifeSummary: Dornagilla MacLachlan was born in 1272, in Scotland. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach". She died in 1320, in her hometown, at the age of 48.

ko.lifeSummary: Dornagilla MacLachlan(은)는 1272년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Dornagilla MacLachlan родилась в 1272 г. в местности Шотландия. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach". Она умерла в 1320 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.
